title: Paletta – AI color system generator for brand design
summary: Generates complete, accessible color systems from a single seed color or brand brief, exporting tokens directly to Figma, Style Dictionary, and CSS.

title: comfyui-depth-warp-nodes – optical-flow depth warping node pack
summary: A set of ComfyUI custom nodes that perform depth-map-guided optical flow warping between frames for temporally stable video diffusion outputs.

title: Folio AI – automated portfolio site builder for creatives
summary: Scrapes uploaded work samples and auto-generates a personal portfolio website with AI-written case study copy and responsive layout variants.

title: SynthStems-1B – stem-separation and re-synthesis model weights
summary: A 1-billion-parameter model trained on 400k mixed tracks that separates audio into eight stems and optionally re-synthesizes any stem in a target instrument timbre.

title: Reframe – batch aspect-ratio recomposition for video editors
summary: Desktop app that uses saliency detection and generative fill to non-destructively reframe existing footage from any source ratio to any target ratio.

title: DiffusionRig-3D: Consistent Character Rigging via Latent Anchoring
summary: Research paper proposing a method that binds a diffusion model's latent space to a parametric 3D skeleton so generated characters remain anatomically consistent across poses.

title: GlyphForge – logotype sketch-to-vector AI
summary: Takes a hand-drawn or rough raster sketch of a wordmark and returns clean, editable SVG vector paths with optically corrected letterforms.

title: mcp-figma-tokens – MCP server for design-token CRUD in Figma
summary: An MCP integration that exposes Figma local variables and token sets as tool calls so AI coding agents can read, write, and synchronize design tokens programmatically.

title: PhotoRAW-LLM – natural-language Lightroom-style editing via vision-language model
summary: Fine-tuned vision-language model that translates plain-English editing instructions into precise parametric RAW adjustments compatible with standard XMP sidecar files.

title: Audionaut – AI music supervisor for indie video creators
summary: SaaS tool that analyzes a video's mood, pacing, and cut points and then licenses or generates matching background music with one-click sync.

title: Tempering Temporal Consistency: A Survey of Frame-Coherence Techniques in Video Diffusion
summary: Comprehensive survey paper cataloging and benchmarking 34 published methods for maintaining temporal consistency in diffusion-based video generation models.

title: SceneForge – text-to-3D scene layout with semantic editing
summary: Web app that generates fully furnished 3D room scenes from text prompts and lets users reposition, swap, or restyle individual objects through follow-up natural-language commands.

title: n8n-ai-brand-guardian – automated brand compliance workflow
summary: An n8n workflow template that watches a shared asset folder and runs each new file through a vision model to flag off-brand colors, fonts, or logo misuse before publish.

title: VocalClone-Fast – 3-second speaker cloning TTS weights
summary: Lightweight 380M-parameter text-to-speech model that clones a target voice from as little as three seconds of reference audio with low-latency streaming inference.

title: Inkdrop – AI illustration style transfer for UI icon sets
summary: Figma plugin that applies a learned illustration style extracted from an uploaded reference sheet uniformly across an entire icon library in one pass.

title: Show HN: I built a real-time AI color grading proxy for DaVinci Resolve
summary: Open-source Python sidecar process that streams frames from DaVinci Resolve's viewer, applies a user-described color grade via a vision-language model, and returns LUT deltas in real time.

title: MotionScript – natural-language keyframe animation for After Effects
summary: After Effects panel and JSX bridge that converts plain-English motion descriptions into keyframed property animations on selected layers.

title: SplatEdit: Interactive Gaussian Splatting Scene Editing via Text Prompts
summary: Paper introducing a pipeline for editing 3D Gaussian Splat scenes by localizing regions with open-vocabulary segmentation and applying diffusion-based inpainting in 3D.

title: Brandcraft AI – end-to-end brand identity generator
summary: SaaS platform that produces a complete brand kit—logo variants, color palette, type pairing, stationery mockups, and brand voice guidelines—from a single onboarding questionnaire.

title: comfyui-audio-reactive – audio-driven animation modulation nodes
summary: ComfyUI node pack that extracts amplitude, beat, and spectral features from an audio file and maps them to diffusion conditioning parameters for audio-reactive video generation.

title: CopyStack – AI copywriting workspace for brand teams
summary: Collaborative SaaS editor where brand teams manage tone-of-voice rules, approve AI-generated copy variants, and push finalized text to CMS platforms via API.

title: adobe-firefly-mcp – MCP skill wrapper for Adobe Firefly API
summary: MCP server that exposes Adobe Firefly's generative fill, text-to-image, and generative expand endpoints as structured tool calls for use in AI agent pipelines.

title: NoiseFree-Portrait-v2 – high-res portrait denoising model
summary: Updated diffusion-based portrait denoising model trained on 2M RAW/JPEG pairs, with improved preservation of fine hair detail and skin texture at ISO 12800 and above.

title: Holomesh – AI-assisted hard-surface 3D modeling for product designers
summary: Browser-based 3D modeler that turns rough sketch images or text descriptions into clean, parametric hard-surface meshes ready for keyshot rendering or 3D printing.

title: Show HN: Generative UI component library trained on 50k Dribbble shots
summary: Open-source fine-tune of a code-generation model on a scraped and cleaned dataset of Dribbble UI designs paired with React component code, released with training scripts.

title: Attune – AI mix assistant plugin for DAWs
summary: VST3/AU plugin that analyzes a full mix in real time and suggests per-track EQ, compression, and reverb settings modeled on a user-selected reference track.

title: Perceptual Typography: Training LLMs to Reason About Type Hierarchy and Legibility
summary: Paper presenting a new benchmark and fine-tuning dataset for evaluating and improving large language models' ability to critique and recommend typographic layout decisions.

title: loopcraft – one-click seamless loop creator for motion graphics
summary: CLI tool and web UI that takes any short video clip and uses frame interpolation plus inpainting to stitch it into a perfectly seamless looping GIF or MP4.

title: Slate – AI storyboard generator for video directors
summary: Uploads a script or shot list and generates a full storyboard with consistent character art, rough camera angles, and scene descriptions using a custom fine-tuned image model.

title: ControlNet-Wireframe – architectural wireframe-to-render ControlNet weights
summary: ControlNet conditioning weights trained specifically on architectural line drawings and blueprints, producing photorealistic interior and exterior renders from wireframe input.

title: make-social-assets – Make.com blueprint for automated social image generation
summary: A ready-to-import Make.com scenario that pulls new blog posts from a CMS webhook and generates on-brand Open Graph images and short-form social variants via an image API.

title: Quill – AI long-form content strategist for creative agencies
summary: Agency-focused content platform with client workspace isolation, AI drafting, SEO scoring, and a built-in approval workflow that routes copy through client sign-off before publish.

title: TextureSynth-XL – tileable texture generation fine-tune
summary: SDXL fine-tune optimized for generating seamlessly tileable PBR texture maps (albedo, roughness, normal, AO) from text or image prompts for game and archviz pipelines.

title: Show HN: ffmpeg-ai-transcoder – natural language ffmpeg command generator
summary: A small Python CLI that takes a plain-English description of a video transcoding task and outputs a validated ffmpeg command, optionally executing it after user confirmation.

title: BrandScan – AI competitive brand audit tool
summary: Crawls a target brand's public digital presence and returns a structured audit of visual identity consistency, tone-of-voice patterns, and gap opportunities versus specified competitors.

title: Ambient Diffusion: Generating Spatial Audio Beds from Scene Descriptions
summary: Research paper presenting a latent diffusion model conditioned on text scene descriptions that generates multi-channel spatial audio atmospheres for film and game use.

title: portrait-relighter – one-shot portrait relighting diffusion model
summary: Diffusion model that takes a portrait photo and a target lighting description or HDRI map and realistically relights the subject while preserving identity and fine detail.

title: comfyui-prompt-matrix-node – exhaustive prompt variant batch node
summary: Single ComfyUI node that parses a prompt with bracketed variable slots and automatically queues every combination as a batch, outputting a labeled contact-sheet image.

title: Kinetic – AI motion design system for brands
summary: SaaS platform where brand teams define animation principles once and then export on-brand motion presets to After Effects, Lottie, and CSS transitions from a single source of truth.

title: Adaptive Noise Scheduling for High-Fidelity Portrait Generation
summary: Paper proposing a dynamic noise schedule that adjusts per-region during diffusion sampling based on semantic segmentation masks, improving fine detail in faces and hair.

title: zapier-ai-product-photography – Zapier template for automated product photo backgrounds
summary: A Zapier workflow that monitors a Dropbox folder for new product cutout images and automatically generates multiple lifestyle background variants using a generative fill API.

title: Proxi – AI-powered proximity and spacing linter for Figma
summary: Figma plugin that audits spacing, alignment, and proximity relationships across a file and suggests fixes aligned to the file's own detected grid and spacing scale.

title: Show HN: I trained a LoRA on every Saul Bass poster and released it
summary: A public LoRA adapter fine-tuned on a curated dataset of 340 Saul Bass film posters and graphics, released with training config, trigger words, and sample prompts.

title: MeshDreamer-v2 – multi-view consistent text-to-mesh model
summary: Updated text-to-3D mesh model that generates watertight, UV-unwrapped meshes with PBR materials from text or image prompts in under 90 seconds on a consumer GPU.

title: ChordCraft – AI chord progression and arrangement generator
summary: Web app where musicians describe a mood, genre, and instrumentation and receive MIDI chord progressions, voicings, and a basic arrangement skeleton exportable to any DAW.

title: StyleScore: A Benchmark for Evaluating Aesthetic Consistency in AI Image Sequences
summary: Paper introducing a new evaluation benchmark and automated metric suite for measuring visual style consistency across multiple generated images intended to form a cohesive set.

title: reactive-lottie-ai – AI-generated Lottie animations from component descriptions
summary: CLI and Node.js library that accepts a UI component description and outputs a production-ready Lottie JSON animation file for micro-interaction states like loading, success, and error.

title: Prism – AI image direction tool for creative teams
summary: Collaborative platform where art directors write image briefs, generate reference boards via integrated diffusion APIs, and deliver annotated creative direction to photographers and retouchers.

title: Real-Time Neural Garment Simulation for Clothed Human Avatars
summary: Paper describing a lightweight neural network that approximates high-fidelity cloth physics for dressed digital humans at interactive frame rates without a traditional physics solver.

title: copyai-brand-voice-mcp – MCP skill for brand-voice-consistent copy generation
summary: MCP server that ingests a brand voice document and exposes a copywriting tool call that constrains any connected LLM agent to produce on-brand copy for specified formats and channels.

title: Flicker – AI-assisted film grain and analog texture toolkit
summary: Lightroom and Photoshop plugin that applies procedurally generated, ISO-accurate film grain profiles built from real scanned film stocks rather than simple noise overlays.

title: Show HN: Open-source AI spec writer – paste a Figma link, get an engineering spec
summary: Python web app that fetches a Figma frame via API, runs it through a vision-language model, and outputs a structured Markdown engineering specification with component inventory and interaction notes.

title: AudioSep-v3 – language-queried audio source separation weights
summary: Third-generation model that separates any sound source described in natural language from a mixture audio file, with improved performance on overlapping timbres and noisy environments.

title: Cascade – AI-driven design handoff annotation tool
summary: Sits between Figma and development and automatically annotates exported assets with spacing, typography, and interaction specs inferred by a vision model rather than manually defined.

title: VideoColorist-LoRA – cinematic color grading LoRA collection for video diffusion
summary: A collection of 12 LoRA adapters for a video diffusion base model, each trained on a specific cinematographer's body of work to transfer their characteristic color language to new footage.

title: Font Intent: Classifying Typographic Emotion with Contrastive Vision-Language Training
summary: Research paper training a contrastive model to align typeface images with emotional and functional descriptors, enabling semantic font search and pairing recommendations.

title: airtable-content-calendar-ai – AI content calendar automation for Airtable
summary: An Airtable scripting automation and base template that uses an LLM API to fill a monthly content calendar with AI-drafted post concepts, captions, and asset briefs keyed to brand guidelines stored in the base.

title: Volum – AI spatial audio design tool for immersive media
summary: Browser-based tool for composing binaural and Ambisonics spatial audio scenes using AI-assisted source placement, room modeling, and distance attenuation for VR, film, and game audio.

title: Canonical Viewpoint Selection for Generative 3D Object Presentation
summary: Paper proposing an algorithm that automatically selects the most informative canonical viewpoint for a generated 3D object to maximize recognizability in 2D thumbnail previews.

title: comfyui-style-transfer-xl – real-time SDXL style transfer node with reference image injection
summary: ComfyUI node that extracts a style embedding from a reference image using a trained adapter and injects it into any SDXL generation without altering the structural content conditioning.

title: TitleCard – AI-generated motion title sequences for filmmakers
summary: Generates animated title card sequences in After Effects or as standalone video files from a film title, genre keywords, and tone description, with custom font and color options.

title: Show HN: Brand logo consistency scorer using CLIP embeddings
summary: Small open-source tool that embeds a library of brand asset images with CLIP and outputs a consistency heatmap showing which assets drift furthest from the brand's visual centroid.
